failure.message: One or more child tests had errors

test-case.name: Dialogue_Close_ResetsState
test-case.output: [GameState] Loading -> Playing [GameState] Playing -> InDialogue [GameState] InDialogue -> Playing [TEST PASS] Dialogue_Close_ResetsState

test-case.name: Dialogue_ClosePhoneCall_ReturnsToPlaying
test-case.output: [GameState] Loading -> Playing [LLM] Switched to character: david [GameState] Playing -> PhoneCall [GameState] PhoneCall -> Playing [TEST PASS] Dialogue_ClosePhoneCall_ReturnsToPlaying

test-case.name: Dialogue_EmptyInput_DoesNotSend
test-case.output: [GameState] Loading -> Playing [GameState] Playing -> InDialogue [TEST PASS] Dialogue_EmptyInput_DoesNotSend

test-case.name: Dialogue_MultipleOpens_NoErrors
test-case.output: [GameState] Loading -> Playing [GameState] Playing -> InDialogue [GameState] InDialogue -> Playing [GameState] Playing -> InDialogue [GameState] InDialogue -> Playing [GameState] Playing -> InDialogue [GameState] InDialogue -> Playing [TEST PASS] Dialogue_MultipleOpens_NoErrors

test-case.name: Dialogue_OpenForNPC_ShowsMarthaGreeting
test-case.output: [GameState] Loading -> Playing [GameState] Playing -> InDialogue [TEST PASS] Dialogue_OpenForNPC_ShowsMarthaGreeting

failure.message: Panel should start hidden Expected: False But was: True

test-case.name: Dialogue_PhoneCall_SwitchesToDavid
test-case.output: [GameState] Loading -> Playing [LLM] Switched to character: david [GameState] Playing -> PhoneCall [TEST PASS] Dialogue_PhoneCall_SwitchesToDavid

test-case.name: Dialogue_SubmitInput_GetsStubResponse
test-case.output: [GameState] Loading -> Playing [GameState] Playing -> InDialogue [TEST PASS] Dialogue_SubmitInput_GetsStubResponse: 'Your hands are doing that thing again. Are you cold, or just thinking?'

test-case.name: ModelDownloader_EnsureModelReady_WhenFileMissing_ReturnsNull
test-case.output: [ModelDownloader] Model not found. Starting download to: /Users/stephone/Library/Application Support/DefaultCompany/LastDay/Models/phi3-mini.gguf [TEST PASS] ModelDownloader_EnsureModelReady_WhenFileMissing_ReturnsNull

failure.message: Should show Martha's greeting, got: 'Is everything alright? You have that look.' Expected: True But was: False

test-case.name: NPC_WalkToMartha_OpensDialogue

failure.message: Dialogue should be closed initially Expected: False But was: True

test-case.output: [GameState] Loading -> Playing [Pathfinder] Grid built: 20x12 cells [Pathfinder] Grid built: 20x12 cells

test-case.name: StateMachine_InvalidTransitions
test-case.output: [Singleton] Duplicate GameStateMachine found on __TestGSM__. Destroying. [GameState] Loading -> Playing [GameState] Invalid transition: Playing -> Ending [GameState] Invalid transition: Playing -> Loading [TEST PASS] StateMachine_InvalidTransitions: all invalid paths rejected

test-case.name: StateMachine_ValidTransitions
test-case.output: [Singleton] Duplicate GameStateMachine found on __TestGSM__. Destroying. [GameState] Loading -> Playing [GameState] Playing -> InDialogue [GameState] InDialogue -> Playing [GameState] Playing -> PhoneCall [GameState] PhoneCall -> Playing [GameState] Playing -> Decision [GameState] Decision -> Ending [TEST PASS] StateMachine_ValidTransitions: all valid paths accepted

test-case.name: T1a_ClickInteractable_PlayerWalksToIt
test-case.output: [GameState] Loading -> Playing [Pathfinder] Grid built: 20x12 cells [Pathfinder] Grid built: 20x12 cells [Event] interact: obj=, memory= [TEST PASS] T1a: Player walked to interactable (dist=0.88, time=0.42s)

failure.message: Dialogue panel should start hidden Expected: False But was: True

test-case.name: T2a_Dialogue_UsesLLMStub_ReturnsResponse
test-case.output: [GameState] Loading -> Playing [GameState] Playing -> InDialogue [TEST PASS] T2a: LLM stub returned response: "Your hands are doing that thing again. Are you cold, or just thinking?"

test-case.name: T2b_Dialogue_CanExitWithCloseButton
test-case.output: [GameState] Loading -> Playing [GameState] Playing -> InDialogue [GameState] InDialogue -> Playing [TEST PASS] T2b: Close button exits dialogue and restores Playing state

test-case.name: T2c_Dialogue_CloseMethod_ExitsDialogue
test-case.output: [GameState] Loading -> Playing [GameState] Playing -> InDialogue [GameState] InDialogue -> Playing [TEST PASS] T2c: Close() properly exits dialogue (Escape key path)

test-case.name: T2d_Dialogue_PhoneCall_UsesDavid
test-case.output: [GameState] Loading -> Playing [LLM] Switched to character: david [GameState] Playing -> PhoneCall [TEST PASS] T2d: Phone call uses David, opening: "Hey, old friend. Thought I'd give you a call today. How are you holding up?"

test-case.name: T3a_Player_MovesToDestination
test-case.output: [GameState] Loading -> Playing [Pathfinder] Grid built: 20x12 cells [Pathfinder] Grid built: 20x12 cells [TEST PASS] T3a: Player reached destination (dist=0.29, time=0.32s)

test-case.name: T3b_Player_CannotMoveInDialogueState
test-case.output: [GameState] Loading -> Playing [GameState] Playing -> InDialogue [Pathfinder] Grid built: 20x12 cells [TEST PASS] T3b: Movement blocked during InDialogue state

test-case.name: T3c_Player_StopsOnForceStop
test-case.output: [GameState] Loading -> Playing [Pathfinder] Grid built: 20x12 cells [Pathfinder] Grid built: 20x12 cells [TEST PASS] T3c: ForceStop() halts movement mid-path

test-case.name: T3d_Player_NavigatesAroundObstacle
test-case.output: [GameState] Loading -> Playing [Pathfinder] Grid built: 20x12 cells [Pathfinder] Grid built: 20x12 cells [TEST PASS] T3d: Pathfinding routed around obstacle (dist=0.43)

test-case.name: AllQuestionsAnswered_SetsShutdownMode
test-case.output: [GameState] Loading -> Playing [Event] All security questions answered — document unlocked, Martha shutdown. [TEST PASS] AllQuestionsAnswered_SetsShutdownMode

test-case.name: OpeningLine_David_Guitar_Q3_IsBlindSpot
test-case.output: [TEST PASS] OpeningLine_David_Guitar_Q3: 'The guitar? Honestly, I have no idea. You just stopped playing one day and I never knew why.'

test-case.name: OpeningLine_David_IcePicks_Q1_ShowsWeight
test-case.output: [TEST PASS] OpeningLine_David_IcePicks_Q1: 'K2. Yeah. I've been waiting for this call for 27 years.'

test-case.name: OpeningLine_Martha_Guitar_Q3_IsRomanticLie
test-case.output: [TEST PASS] OpeningLine_Martha_Guitar_Q3: 'Our tenth anniversary. I think about that night all the time. The way you played in the kitchen before the sun came up.'

test-case.name: OpeningLine_Martha_IcePicks_Q1_MentionsHeroNarrative
test-case.output: [TEST PASS] OpeningLine_Martha_IcePicks_Q1: 'You were so brave up there. The storm, the cold — you tried to hold on. You couldn't save them. But you tried.'

test-case.name: SecurityQuestion_PhoneDoesNotRingTwice
test-case.output: [GameState] Loading -> Playing [Event] Security question 0 started. Active question now: 1 [Event] Phone triggered — player needs David. [Event] Security question 1 started. Active question now: 2 [Event] Security question 2 started. Active question now: 3 [TEST PASS] SecurityQuestion_PhoneDoesNotRingTwice

test-case.name: SecurityQuestion_PhoneRings_WhenQ1Starts
test-case.output: [GameState] Loading -> Playing [Event] Security question 0 started. Active question now: 1 [Event] Phone triggered — player needs David. [TEST PASS] SecurityQuestion_PhoneRings_WhenQ1Starts

test-case.name: SecurityQuestion_Started_AdvancesActiveQuestion
test-case.output: [GameState] Loading -> Playing [Event] Security question 0 started. Active question now: 1 [Event] Phone triggered — player needs David. [Event] Security question 1 started. Active question now: 2 [Event] Security question 2 started. Active question now: 3 [TEST PASS] SecurityQuestion_Started_AdvancesActiveQuestion

test-case.name: SecurityQuestion_Started_IsIdempotent_WhenRepeated
test-case.output: [GameState] Loading -> Playing [Event] Security question 0 started. Active question now: 1 [Event] Phone triggered — player needs David. [TEST PASS] SecurityQuestion_Started_IsIdempotent_WhenRepeated

test-case.name: StubResponse_David_Q1_ResistsThenReveals
test-case.output: [GameState] Loading -> Playing [Event] Security question 0 started. Active question now: 1 [Event] Phone triggered — player needs David. [TEST PASS] StubResponse_David_Q1_ResistsThenReveals

test-case.name: StubResponse_David_Q2_ResistsThenReveals
test-case.output: [GameState] Loading -> Playing [Event] Security question 0 started. Active question now: 1 [Event] Phone triggered — player needs David. [Event] Security question 1 started. Active question now: 2 [TEST PASS] StubResponse_David_Q2_ResistsThenReveals

test-case.name: StubResponse_Martha_Q1_MentionsHeroNarrative
test-case.output: [GameState] Loading -> Playing [Event] Security question 0 started. Active question now: 1 [Event] Phone triggered — player needs David. [TEST PASS] StubResponse_Martha_Q1: 'The storm was terrible. He fought to hold it. That is all that matters. You know, I worry about David sometimes. Alone in that house.'

test-case.name: StubResponse_Martha_ShutdownMode_IsRaw
test-case.output: [GameState] Loading -> Playing [Event] All security questions answered — document unlocked, Martha shutdown. [TEST PASS] StubResponse_Martha_ShutdownMode: 'I kept the pieces, Robert. In a box in the closet. Thirty-seven years.'
